\f0\fs22 \cf2 \CocoaLigature0 name: 'Submit a Method'\cf3 \
    \cf2 about: 'Contribute a method and your experience'\cf3 \
    \cf2 title: 'New Method: '\cf3 \
    \cf2 labels: 'new-method'\cf3 \
    \
    \
    \cf2 Method Name\cf3 \
    \cf2 (If it\'92s your own method, give it a name)\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Method URL\cf3 \
    \cf2 (When there is no good website, write an article about the method)\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Purpose\cf3 \
    \cf2 (What is the method for?)\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Process (High-level)\cf3 \
    \cf2 (The big picture / high-level process)\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Experience\cf3 \
    \cf2 (How do you like the method? What went well, what broke?)\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Author\cf3 \
    \cf2 (Your Name)\cf3 \
    \
    \
    \
    \cf2 Optional Details\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Industry\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "Finance", "Healthcare")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Organization Size\cf3 \
    \cf2 (<10, <50, <200, <1000, <5000, >5000)\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Teams Applied To\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "3")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 People Per Team\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "5")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Roles\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "Devs, PMs")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Leadership or Hierarchy Levels Involved\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "2")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Frequency\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "Daily")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Time Period\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "6 months")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Layers between you and the Customer\cf3 \
    \cf2 (e.g. "2")\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 When it breaks\cf3 \
    \cf2 (Limitations of the method)\cf3 \
    \
    \cf2 Tips\cf3 \
    \cf2 (Tips and tricks for success)\cf3 \
}
